channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: NSW court invalidates protest laws, putting Town Hall charges under review
item.description: Criminal charges against demonstrators who clashed with police during Israeli President Isaac Herzog's visit to Sydney are now uncertain after the NSW Court of Appeal declared new protest restrictions...

item.title: Inditex investigates third-party security breach affecting transaction records
item.description: Inditex, the Spanish multinational behind popular fashion brands like Zara, announced that it had detected unauthorized access to certain databases containing transaction-related information. The affe...

item.title: Fire at major Australian refinery raises concerns over fuel supply
item.description: A major fire broke out at the Viva Energy refinery in Geelong, Victoria, after a gas leak ignited and triggered a chain of explosions. The blaze sent flames soaring as high as 60 metres and forced eme...

item.title: South African women lead efforts to restore water systems in the Western Cape by clearing invasive plants
item.description: In the Western Cape, South Africa, water scarcity remains a critical challenge, and one of the most effective solutions lies in removing invasive alien plants. These non-native species consume far mor...

item.title: Assessing the Impact of Fuel Subsidy Removal on Nigeria’s Economy
item.description: For many Nigerians, life don still hard even after government remove fuel subsidy in 2023. The authorities talk say e painful but necessary move to rescue the nation money matter. Dem argue say subsid...

item.title: NGX and BoI Partner to Strengthen SME Access to Capital Markets
item.description: Nigerian Exchange Limited (NGX) and Bank of Industry (BoI) don step up efforts to involve Small and Medium-sized Enterprises (SMEs) for inside Nigeria’s formal capital market. Dis workshop wey happen ...

item.title: ED arrests former Reliance ADAG executives Amitabh Jhunjhunwala and Amit Bapna in suspected loan fraud‑linked money laundering case
item.description: The Enforcement Directorate has arrested former senior executives of the Anil Dhirubhai Ambani Group (ADAG), Amitabh Jhunjhunwala and Amit Bapna, in connection with an ongoing money laundering investi...

item.title: Charlotte Hornets Win Thrilling Play-In Game Against Miami Heat
item.description: The Charlotte Hornets secured a dramatic 127-126 overtime victory against the Miami Heat in the SoFi NBA Play-In Tournament, keeping their postseason hopes alive. LaMelo Ball led the Hornets with a st...

item.title: COVID-19 and other respiratory viruses drive rise in preventable hospital admissions in Canada
item.description: Hospital admissions for vaccine-preventable respiratory diseases in Canada more than doubled in 2024-2025 compared to pre-pandemic levels, with COVID-19 accounting for over 40 per cent of these cases,...

item.title: Government Announces 50% Increase in Lok Sabha Seats, Reserving 272 for Women
item.description: On Thursday, Union Law Minister Arjun Ram Meghwal announced in the Lok Sabha that the total number of Lok Sabha seats across all states will be increased by 50 per cent. The current strength of the Ho...

item.title: Archaeologists Identify the Exact Location of Shakespeare’s London Home
item.description: Researchers have finally determined the location of William Shakespeare’s residence in London, solving a centuries-old mystery that has intrigued historians and literary scholars alike. Using a combin...

item.title: Australian Athletics Sees Rising Talent and Strong Rivalries Among Sprinters and Middle-Distance Athletes
item.description: Australian athletics is entering an exciting phase, with a wave of young sprinters and middle-distance athletes generating buzz both on and off the track. Rising stars like Gout Gout and Lachlan Kenne...

item.title: BBC investigation uncovers adviser offering to falsify domestic abuse claims for migrants seeking UK residence
item.description: A BBC investigation has revealed that some legal advisers are encouraging migrants to fabricate claims of domestic abuse in order to stay in the United Kingdom. Undercover BBC reporters discovered tha...

item.title: Geely Launches E2, South Africa’s Affordable City EV with Competitive Features
item.description: Chinese automaker Geely has officially launched the E2 in South Africa, positioning it as the country’s most affordable electric vehicle. The entry-level Aspire model starts at R339,900, making it R2,...

item.title: Pakistan’s Army Chief Visits Tehran to Facilitate US-Iran Negotiations Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: Pakistan's army chief, Field Marshal Asim Munir, arrived in Tehran to engage with Iranian officials as part of efforts to mediate between the US and Iran. Pakistan has become a key intermediary after ...

item.title: Dianna Russini Resigns Amid Controversy Over Relationship With Coach Mike Vrabel and Ethics Debate
item.description: Fox News' report by Howard Kurtz covers the controversy surrounding New York Times NFL reporter Dianna Russini and New England Patriots coach Mike Vrabel after leaked photos showed the two in a hot tu...

item.title: US Lawmakers Push for UN Reform, Advocate for Pro-American Leadership
item.description: A heated debate is unfolding within the United States Congress regarding the reform of the United Nations. Representative Michael Waltz has been a vocal proponent of changes aimed at ensuring the UN's...

item.title: Pakistan’s Path to Affordable Energy Through Electrification
item.description: This article by Ammar H Khan, published in Dawn on April 12, 2026, discusses Pakistan’s heavy dependence on imported fossil fuels and presents electrification as a practical solution for both energy s...

item.title: Study reveals rising gambling among South Africans due to financial strain
item.description: A new study by Old Mutual Corporate has revealed that about 40% of working South Africans are turning to gambling to help manage monthly financial shortfalls. With soaring living costs and stagnating ...

item.title: Historical Perspective on U.S. Claims About Iran's Nuclear Program
item.description: The article argues that U.S. hostilities toward Iran over the past four decades have been fueled by an unfounded accusation that Iran has a nuclear weapons program. While Iran's government has been cr...
